novel_features.name: Offline full-text search
novel_features.description: Search the Qur'an offline by word or meaning across Arabic and the Indonesian Tafsiriyah.
novel_features.rationale: Requires a local SQLite FTS index over synced verses; the Tafsiriyah server's own search endpoint returns 404.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Reach for this when you need to locate verses by meaning without a live search API.

novel_features.name: Cross-source verse lookup
novel_features.description: Get a single verse (e.g. 2:255) with Arabic and the Tafsiriyah translation joined together.
novel_features.rationale: Joins the Tafsiriyah translation with Quran.com Arabic/metadata from the local store in one call.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use for a precise ayah lookup instead of fetching a whole surah.

novel_features.name: Verse of the day
novel_features.description: A stable, date-seeded verse of the day with its Tafsiriyah translation.
novel_features.rationale: Deterministic date-seeded pick from the local store; no network call.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use for a reproducible daily reflection verse.

novel_features.name: Khatam reading plan
novel_features.description: Build and follow a plan to finish the Qur'an in N days, tracking progress locally.
novel_features.rationale: Computes daily ranges and persists progress in SQLite — no API offers this.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use to pace and track a full Qur'an reading over time.

novel_features.name: Hifz memorization tracker
novel_features.description: Mark and review Qur'an memorization progress per surah or verse.
novel_features.rationale: Local per-verse memorization state that no upstream API stores.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use to track what you have memorized across sessions.

novel_features.name: Bookmarks with notes
novel_features.description: Save verses with personal notes for later, offline.
novel_features.rationale: Local verse bookmarks with notes; the corpus APIs are read-only and stateless.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use to keep a personal, portable set of saved verses.

novel_features.name: Random ayah
novel_features.description: A random verse with its Tafsiriyah translation for reflection.
novel_features.rationale: Local random selection from the synced store, works offline.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use for a spontaneous verse for study or reflection.

narrative.headline: Every Al-Qur'an feature the app has, plus the Indonesian Tarjamah Tafsiriyah offline, a local database, offline search, a khatam plan, and a hifz tracker no other Qur'an tool has.
narrative.value_prop: QuranKu carries Ustadz Muhammad Thalib's Tarjamah Tafsiriyah translation alongside Quran.com's metadata and audio, all in a local SQLite store. Read any surah, look up any verse, search offline with `find`, follow a `plan` to finish the Qur'an, and track memorization with `hifz`.

quickstart.comment: Verify the sources are reachable before syncing.
Pull all 114 surahs (Arabic + Tafsiriyah) into the local store once.
Read Al-Fatihah with the Tafsiriyah translation.
Search offline across Arabic and the Tafsiriyah.

troubleshoots.fix: Run `quranku-pp-cli sync` first to populate the local store.

troubleshoots.symptom: surah get is slow or fails offline
troubleshoots.fix: After `sync`, reads come from the local store; check the Tafsiriyah source with `doctor` if a fresh fetch fails.

narrative.when_to_use: Use QuranKu when an agent or user needs Qur'an text with the Indonesian Tarjamah Tafsiriyah, offline verse search, precise ayah lookups, or personal reading/memorization tracking. It is the only tool that carries this specific translation with a local database.
anti_triggers: Do not use for hadith, fiqh rulings, or non-Qur'an Islamic texts.
Do not use for prayer times or qibla direction.
Do not use to modify or publish Qur'an content upstream — it is read-only plus local personal state.

recipes.title: Read a surah with translation
recipes.explanation: Fetch Yasin and narrow the payload to just the Tafsiriyah translation lines.

recipes.title: Offline meaning search
recipes.explanation: Find verses mentioning patience across the local Arabic + Tafsiriyah index.

recipes.title: Start a 30-day khatam
recipes.explanation: Create a reading plan that finishes the Qur'an in 30 days and tracks progress.
